title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. on macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; pip-installable.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; docker run in one command.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, syntax themes and keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and fluent API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing an idiomatic client for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community node for n8n that adds Ollama chat, completion and embedding actions to workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module that spins up an Ollama server on AWS EC2 with NVIDIA GPU support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that caches and serves Ollama models as a sidecar container.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit app template showing RAG with Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Bolt-js Slack bot that threads Ollama replies and supports @mention and DM workflows.

title: ollama-mattermost
summary: Mattermost plugin that adds an “/ollama” slash command to query local models from chat.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example for horizontally scaling Ollama inference workers.
